architecture.note: Ports&Adapters preserved; read-only-by-composition intact (gate clean, 240 files); pre-spawn guard is defence-in-depth, no new infra import / singleton / timeout gap

security.note: Shape-guard now guards the value that actually crosses the spawn seam (record.changeId) — strengthens vs prior handle-guard; argv-array spawn + leading-hyphen rejection retained; JSON.stringify in log detail is safe

quality.note: typecheck+eslint clean; no dead surface (lastArg used by HD-004 test); contract change applied consistently across port+adapters+call-site+guard; new behaviour fully tested; no CR-10 perf anti-patterns
